confirmed_issues.description: Prettier formatting violations in scripts/validate-implementation.mjs (18 errors) and scripts/pipeline-watcher.js (1 error) causing npm run lint to report 19 errors. No runtime or correctness impact.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: Recent commits to validate-implementation.mjs and pipeline-watcher.js did not run eslint --fix before committing, leaving inconsistent whitespace and trailing-comma formatting.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Run eslint --fix on the two affected scripts files to auto-correct formatting. Zero logic changes.

confirmed_not_issues.description: permission_ea_bridge: ALL 4 required checks confirmed present — missing key (401), unconfigured secret (503), hash_equals comparison (403), missing user_id (400), invalid user_id (403), wp_set_current_user binding. CORRECT.

Stale rejection at 300s (422), warn-only 120-300s, OHLC guard, epoch guard (pre-2000 rejection), M1 candle age guard (180s), M15 candle age guard (1800s), tick_volume guard (non-numeric and negative clamped), bid/ask finite positive check, map_symbol_aliases(). ALL CONFIRMED CORRECT.

confirmed_not_issues.system: MQL5 EA vs PHP Payload Parity
confirmed_not_issues.description: EA sends user_id, symbol, normalized_symbol, timeframe (M1), timestamp (not quote_time — PHP accepts both), bid, ask, freshness, session, candle{time,open,high,low,close,volume}, candle_m15{...}. PHP handler reads and validates all fields correctly.
Returns HTTP 401 for unauthenticated requests via permission_user. This is EXPECTED BEHAVIOR — not a bug.
All /admin/* routes use permission_admin which requires manage_options capability. CORRECT.
Dashboard gets is_live, age_sec, and freshness from backend /snapshot. staleTime:0 on useEngineHealth(). No faking of live status. CORRECT.
All 4 Phase 1 routes implemented: POST /ea/heartbeat, POST /ea/account-sync, POST /ea/symbol-sync, GET /ea/license-check. All use permission_ea_bridge. Awaiting live terminal validation.
9 pre-existing ESLint warnings (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps, react-refresh/only-export-components) in UI components. Not blocking, not introduced by this workflow.

migration_blockers.description: Live MT5 terminal verification still pending for /ea/license-check, /ea/heartbeat, /ea/account-sync, /ea/symbol-sync routes. Code is implemented and regression-covered; requires Track A live terminal execution.
migration_blockers.status: PENDING — BLOCKED ON TRACK A LIVE TESTING

assessment.backend_authority: PRESERVED — signal truth lives in WordPress plugin
assessment.migration_phase_1: IN-PROGRESS — code complete, live validation pending
